1725170.name: Eggs 2142
1725170.description:
The Galactic Eggpire are taking over the galaxy. Join The Scrambled Alliance to roll, launch and scramble some eggs!

Eggs 2142 Features

  • Fast paced physics-based combat! Roll your egg at high speeds to damage enemies and cause some eggy mayhem!
  • Large scale battles on a variety of different planets with multiple game modes!
  • Battle and crack hundreds of AI controlled eggs in custom sandbox battles!
  • Use an arsenal of new and improved tools and abilities to create unique combinations for your mighty egg!
1725170.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
